headline: 30 Years of Million Mile Drivers: How J.B. Hunt Recognizes Safety and Raises the Bar
summary: LOWELL, Ark., April 29, 2026--J.B. Hunt Transport Services Inc. (Nasdaq: JBHT) today honored 54 drivers in Lowell for achieving 2, 3, 4 and 5 million miles without a DOT-reportable preventable accident. The recognition took place during the company’s annual Million Mile celebration, which marked the program’s 30th anniversary.

content.title: 30 Years of Million Mile Drivers: How J.B. Hunt Recognizes Safety and Raises the Bar

thumbnail.caption: J.B. Hunt Intermodal driver Steve Kirschbaum celebrates 5 million miles without a DOT-reportable preventable accident at J.B. Hunt's annual Million Mile Walk of Fame at company headquarters on April 29.
